title: LinkedIn Profile Scraper Input
description: Scrape public LinkedIn profile data. Provide profile URLs to extract current titles, companies, locations, and more.

profileUrls.title: Profile URLs
profileUrls.description: List of LinkedIn profile URLs to scrape. Accepts formats like: https://www.linkedin.com/in/username, https://linkedin.com/in/username, or just the username slug.

includeExperience.title: Include Experience Details
includeExperience.description: Extract full work experience history (titles, companies, dates). Slower but more data.

includeSkills.title: Include Skills
includeSkills.description: Extract listed skills from the profile.

slowMode.title: Slow Mode (Safer)
slowMode.description: Add random delays between requests to reduce blocking risk. Recommended for 50+ profiles.

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of parallel requests. Lower = safer, higher = faster.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Residential proxies strongly recommended for reliability.
